addressLines: Situated amidst the serene landscapes of Palakkad district in Kerala, Ansar School Padinjarangadi was established in 1986 by the Alfalah Charitable Trust, a non-profit organization committed to educational empowerment. Our school is dedicated to providing quality education and support to children, particularly from economically disadvantaged backgrounds. With a holistic approach, we prioritize both academic excellence and moral development, integrating innovative teaching methodologies such as concept-based learning through multimedia resources and Cyber Square Information Technology platforms. Our campus boasts a well-facilitated playground and a fully-equipped physical education department staffed with dedicated professionals. At Ansar School Padinjarangadi, we strive to nurture well-rounded individuals, fostering a conducive environment for learning and growth..

Perched atop a hill, our campus overlooks the picturesque agricultural lands of Padinjarangadi, offering a panoramic eagle-eye view. Boasting iconic architecture, captivating landscaping, and state-of-the-art facilities including a purpose-built playground, swimming pool, and auditorium, our institution stands as the epitome of excellence in both academia and extracurricular pursuits. Join us for a journey of committed learning and unparalleled achievement.

Situated amidst the serene landscapes of Palakkad district in Kerala, Ansar School Padinjarangadi was established in 1986 by the Alfalah Charitable Trust, a non-profit organization committed to educational empowerment.

Our campus boasts a well-facilitated playground and a fully-equipped physical education department staffed with dedicated professionals. At Ansar School Padinjarangadi, we strive to nurture well-rounded individuals, fostering a conducive environment for learning and growth.

At Ansar School Padinjarangadi, we are dedicated to delivering high-quality education, promoting academic excellence, and instilling strong moral values in our students. Our goal is to develop self-sufficient individuals who will positively contribute to society.

At Ansar School Padinjarangadi, we are dedicated to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we handle your information when you use our app or visit our website. By accessing our services or website, you agree to these terms.
This policy outlines the procedure and conditions for canceling student registration at Ansar School Padinjarangadi.
This policy applies to all students enrolled in Ansar School Padinjarangadi.
